name: Jared Alexander Masters
tagline: Scores for films that live outside.
subhead: Custom music for documentaries, brand films, and commercials in the outdoor and adventure world. Bring the cut and the rough idea, the “can it sound like this?”, and I make it sound like that.
bio: I write original music for the outdoor and adventure world: films, documentaries, and brand campaigns. My scores have carried work for The North Face, Patagonia, Subaru, and Ford, with selections at Banff and Mountainfilm. I'm also a recording artist and producer.
availability: Available for a limited number of projects.
metaDescription: Jared Alexander Masters is a composer for outdoor and adventure films, documentaries, and brands. Original scores for The North Face, Patagonia, Subaru, and Ford, plus music production for artists such as 311. Banff and Mountainfilm 2023 official selections.
vinylBlurb: A 10-song folk Americana LP, produced by the Hazelrigg Brothers in DSD through a completely analog chain.
